content:
So the situation is clear: M55 has shipped all 5 domains + Red Team GRUDGING PASS, but no `/gsd-t-verify` was run, so no fresh verify-report exists, and complete-milestone has a Step 1 guard that requires VERIFIED status.

Let me check progress.md status more carefully — it says "ready for Red Team + measurement + complete-milestone". The Red Team has happened (per commit fce2f18). Measurement is the open item.

The success criteria require measurement before tagging. Let me check the most recent continue-here for the latest plan.
